stemHtml:
An aircraft piston engine may be operated with the following oils:

Aero Oil 80
Aero Oil 90
Aero Oil 100
Aero Oil 120
15W-30
15W-50

Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Aero Oil 80 is a multigrade oil and is better suited for higher operating temperatures than Aero Oil 120.
options.b: 15W-30 is a multigrade oil and provides better low-temperature performance than Aero Oil 80.
options.c: Aero Oil 120 is a multigrade oil and is better suited for lower temperatures than 15W-50.
options.d: Aero Oil 100 and 120 are multigrade oils and are better suited for low-temperature operation than 15W-50.
